name: Material
description: Profile for material samples documenting identification, visual characterization, composition, and thermal processing history.
ExpectedUse: Metadata for physical material specimens, alloy batches, and reference materials in materials science workflows, linking samples to characterization data and experimental use.

Properties.Name: materialID
Properties.Title: Material ID
Properties.Description: Unique identifier assigned to a specific material sample, alloy batch, or substance.

Properties.Name: previewImage
Properties.Title: Preview Image
Properties.Description: URL(s) to thumbnail or preview images providing visual representation of a resource's content.

Properties.Name: semImage
Properties.Title: SEM Image
Properties.Description: Handle identifier for a scanning electron microscopy (SEM) image associated with a material sample or experiment.

Properties.Name: hasChemicalComposition
Properties.Title: Has Chemical Composition
Properties.Description: Handle identifier for a resource containing the chemical composition data of a material sample.

Properties.Name: hasHeatTreatment
Properties.Title: Has Heat Treatment
Properties.Description: Handle identifier for a resource documenting the heat treatment process applied to a material sample.
